rules: Read SOUL.md, T27-CONSTITUTION.md, TASK.md, and AGENTS.md before making changes.
Every .t27 spec must contain test/invariant/bench blocks (TDD mandate, SOUL Article II).
Commits must reference issues with Closes #N (L1 TRACEABILITY).
Files under gen/ are generated; edit specs instead (L2 GENERATION).
Source files must be ASCII-only with English identifiers (L3 PURITY).
